overview: Aura Sublime Perfume is a full-stack luxury perfume e-commerce website featuring a stunning product catalog, shopping cart, Stripe checkout, user accounts, and a powerful admin dashboard for inventory and order management.
features: Hero landing page with brand story and CTA
Product catalog with fragrance type filters and search
Product detail pages with notes, ratings, and reviews
Shopping cart with real-time quantity updates
User accounts with order history via Internet Identity
Admin dashboard for product, inventory, and order management
